topIngredients.name: Shea Butter
topIngredients.benefit: Rich emollient that repairs dry and flaky skin

topIngredients.name: Sweet Almond Oil
topIngredients.benefit: Nourishes with fatty acids and vitamins

verdict: Embryolisse is a French pharmacy classic prized for its multi-use versatility as moisturizer, primer, and mask. Natural ingredient base with good nourishing properties, though the formula is not as clinically advanced as newer options.
